records.question: Which documents named Review on French files, dated on or before 1980-10-22 14:17:11, are linked to the Population Research project and have a CV type described as excellent with government expense details?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date <= '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files'
records.pred_sql:
select documents.document_id
from documents
join projects on documents.project_id = projects.project_id
join ref_document_types on documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
join documents_with_expenses on documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
where lower(documents.document_name) like '%review on french files%'
  and documents.document_date <= '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  and lower(projects.project_details) like '%population research%'
  and lower(ref_document_types.document_type_name) like '%cv%'
  and lower(ref_document_types.document_type_description) like '%excellent%'
  and lower(documents_with_expenses.document_details) like '%government expense%'
limit 5;
records.thought: We need documents with name 'Review on French files', date on or before the given date, linked to the 'Population Research' project, with a CV type described as 'excellent', and with government expense details. This requires joining Documents to Projects, Ref_Document_Types, and Documents_with_Expen

records.question: Which documents named Katheryn statement have a document type that is Paper with a good description and are linked to expenses where the details are exactly organization?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'organization' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'good' AND documents.document_name = 'Katheryn statement'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents join ref_document_types on documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code join documents_with_expenses on documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id where lower(documents.document_name) like '%katheryn statement%' and lower(ref_document_types.document_type_name) like '%paper%' and lower(ref_document_types.document_type_description) like '%good%' and documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'organization' limit 5;
records.thought: We need documents with name like 'katheryn statement', document type name like 'paper', document type description like 'good', and linked to expenses where document_details = 'organization'. This requires joins between documents, ref_document_types, and documents_with_expenses.

records.question: What documents named Winona Book have a document date on or after 1971-06-09 19:03:41?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.document_date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41' AND documents.document_name = 'Winona Book'
records.pred_sql: select documents.document_id from documents where lower(documents.document_name) like '%winona book%' and documents.document_date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter documents where the document_name contains 'winona book' (case-insensitive) and the document_date is on or after '1971-06-09 19:03:41'.

records.question: Which documents named Review on French files, dated on or after 1980-10-22 14:17:11, have a CV type described as excellent, are linked to the Population Research project, come from an Open Project statement, and include government expenses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Open Project' AND documents.document_date >= '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project'
records.pred_sql:
select documents.document_id
from documents
join ref_document_types on documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
join projects on documents.project_id = projects.project_id
join statements on statements.statement_id = documents.document_id
join documents_with_expenses on documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
join ref_budget_codes on documents_with_expenses.budget_type_code = ref_budget_codes.budget_type_code
where lower(documents.document_name) like '%review on french files%'
  and documents.document_date >= '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  and lower(ref_document_types.document_type_description) like '%excellent%'
  and lower(projects.project_details) like '%population research%'
  and lower(statements.statement_details) like '%open project%'
  and lower(ref_budget_codes.budget_type_description) like '%government%'
limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter documents by name, date, document type description, project details, statement details, and ensure they have related government expenses. This requires joining Documents with Ref_Document_Types, Projects, Statements, Documents_with_Expenses, and Ref_Budget_Codes.

records.question: Which documents have related projects, reference document types with document type description exactly 'good' and document type name exactly 'Paper', statements, and documents with expenses?

SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code

records.thought: We need documents that have related projects, reference document types with exact description 'good' and name 'Paper', related statements, and related documents with expenses. We'll join all relevant tables and filter on the exact values.
